message.content:
@startuml
participant "ColleaguesCheckbox" as C1
participant "LoginFrame" as L1
participant "ColleaguesTextField" as C2
participant "ColleaguesButton" as C3

C1 ..> L1 : colleagueChanged

L1 ..> C2 : setColleaguesEnable
C2 ..> L1 : setColleaguesEnable

L1 ..> C3 : setColleaguesEnable
C3 ..> L1 : setColleaguesEnable

@enduml
